title: nepeta humilis
intro: Nepeta humilis, also known as Dwarf Catmint, is a low-growing perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Nepeta humilis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Nepeta humilis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and relaxation.
